source: owner screenshot of Claude.app Code page, 2026-07-13 (2000x1307)

sidebar: nav: + New session, Artifacts, Customize, More (chevron)
sessions grouped by repo: group header = repo name + chevron; items = numbered square chip + title
main: session header: laptop icon + session title + repo chip (grey rounded); right icons: terminal, panel-toggle, globe, kebab, close

transcript rows: muted grey tool lines w/ trailing chevron ('Ran 3 commands, used 3 tools >'), '/compact' style slash chips in light blue, right-aligned user bubbles (grey rounded), assistant prose in near-black
PR chip row: purple-tinted rounded bar: branch icon + #9 + repo + branch name, right 'Merged' label + x
branch bar above composer: repo + branch left, diff counts (+40 -22 green/red) + 'Create PR' button right
composer: rounded rect, placeholder 'Type / for commands', right-side checkbox-ish icon; below: 'Bypass permissions' amber chip + plus + mic left, 'Fable 5' + 'High' + spinner right
